recommendations.title: Torque

recommendations.title: Stone Cold

recommendations.title: The Fast and the Furious
recommendations.overview: Dominic Toretto is a Los Angeles street racer suspected of masterminding a series of big-rig hijackings. When undercover cop Brian O'Conner infiltrates Toretto's iconoclastic crew, he falls for Toretto's sister and must choose a side: the gang or the

recommendations.title: Point Break
recommendations.overview: A young undercover FBI agent infiltrates a gang of thieves who share a common interest in extreme sports. A remake of the 1991 film, "Point Break".

recommendations.title: Point Break
recommendations.overview: In Los Angeles, a gang of bank robbers who call themselves The Ex-Presidents commit their crimes while wearing masks of Reagan, Carter, Nixon and Johnson. Believing that the members of the gang could be surfers, the F.B.I. sends young agent Johnny Ut

recommendations.title: Furioza
recommendations.overview: A policewoman makes her ex-boyfriend an offer he can't refuse: either he infiltrates and informs on a gang of hooligans, or his brother goes to jail.

recommendations.title: Donnie Brasco
recommendations.overview: An FBI undercover agent infiltrates the mob and identifies more with the mafia life at the expense of his regular one.

recommendations.title: No Mercy
recommendations.overview: An unconventional undercover Chicago cop and his partner are recruited to commit the murder of a New Orleans criminal kingpin.

recommendations.title: A Day to Die

recommendations.title: The French Connection
recommendations.overview: Tough narcotics detective 'Popeye' Doyle is in hot pursuit of a suave French drug dealer who may be the key to a huge heroin-smuggling operation.
